text.title: Testing Patterns
text.summary: Vitest config, unit and component tests, MSW for API mocking, and vi.mock module mocking.

section.title: Vitest configuration
section.reference: Full Vitest config with coverage and setup

rule.statement: Use MSW (Mock Service Worker) for API mocking in tests. Define handlers once; reuse in tests, Storybook, and browser dev. Prefer MSW over mocking fetch/axios directly.
rule.rationale: MSW intercepts at the network level, allowing tests to exercise the full data-fetching path including error handling, headers, and status codes without modifying production code.
